message:
🐛 Fix navbar layout shift when toggling demo mode / agent (#322)

Three changes eliminate layout shift in the navbar when demo mode
or agent connection state changes:

1. Navbar.tsx: Swap AgentSelector before AgentStatusIndicator so
   the selector appearing/disappearing only affects space to the
   left (into the search bar gap), not items to the right. Always
   render AgentSelector (remove conditional).

2. AgentSelector.tsx: Handle demo mode internally — return null
   when isDemoMode is true, instead of relying on parent conditional.

3. AgentStatusIndicator.tsx: Always show a text label (Demo, AI,
   Degraded, Offline) instead of only showing text in demo mode.
   This keeps the indicator width stable across state changes.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
